evidence.snippet:
Complete EMC, Environmental Stress, Photometric, and Wireless Testing Services
==============================================================================
Founded in 1954, Elite Electronic Engineering, Inc. is a full-service electromagnetic compatibility/interference (EMC/EMI), environmental stress, and photometric testing laboratory. We are the premier test provider for the automotive, aerospace, military, heavy equipment, electronics, and telecommunications industries.

#### EMI/EMC Testing
The industry’s most capable Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) testing services.

items.notes: Full-service EMC/EMI, environmental stress, photometric, and wireless testing laboratory serving aerospace, military, and commercial industries. Tests to MIL-STD-461, MIL-STD-810, RTCA DO-160, and other standards.

evidence.snippet: Founded in 1954, Elite Electronic Engineering, Inc. is a full-service electromagnetic compatibility/interference (EMC/EMI), environmental stress, and photometric testing laboratory. We are the premier test provider for the automotive, aerospace, military, heavy equipment, electronics, and telecommunications industries.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Testing lab serving aerospace, military, and automotive industries. No UXV-specific product line found. Provides compliance testing services relevant to UXV component manufacturers (MIL-STD-461, MIL-STD-810, DO-160) but no explicit drone/UAS focus.

Elite Electronic Engineering, Inc. is recognized worldwide as a leader in product qualification and compliance testing services. Few laboratories offer our combination of expert engineers, state-of-the-art equipment, and cutting-edge test facilities all in one location.

readiness.notes: Actively operating test lab with scheduled services, certified staff, and accreditations (A2LA, NVLAP, ISO 17025). Offers quote-based scheduling.

unresolved_questions: No drone/UAV-specific mentions found anywhere in corpus — vendor serves aerospace and military but no explicit UXV product focus
NDAA and Blue UAS compliance not disclosed anywhere on the site
tagline: Independent test lab offering EMI/EMC, environmental stress, and regulatory compliance testing across military (MIL-STD-461, MIL-STD-810), aviation (RTCA DO-160), and commercial standards. NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown. Production-ready; serves aerospace, defense, automotive, and wireless sectors. Public evidence limited on unmanned-systems work specifically.
